series_metadata.series_title: Certified Home Health Agencies Annual Re
series_metadata.series_description: Contains information which registers each home health agency and informs the state of all home health agency activities (i.e. personnel, ancillary services, patients, geographic area served, discharges, admissions, fees/costs and etc.).

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for 3 years after the hard copy is destroyed ; Paper: Retain 2 years after the file has been completed, then destroy if no legal action is pending, Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Wastepaper
